headings.usage: Use for H1, H2, H3 to convey heritage, trust, and academic excellence. Apply tracking-tight for modern elegance.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, labels, and small text. Highly legible and modern.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for section padding. Optical alignment over strict geometric centering.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento grids for features (Facilities, Branches). Asymmetrical layouts for About Us section.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Rounded corners (rounded-2xl) for a friendly, welcoming feel. Soft ambient shadows (shadow-sm or shadow-md) for elevation.

components_strategy.marketing_pages: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layout of Home, About, Academics. Shadcn for Interactive elements like Forms, Dialogs, Carousels.
components_strategy.admin_dashboard: Strict grid hierarchy. High density. Use Shadcn Table, Select, Dialog, Card. Cardless or subtle borders (border-border/40).
components_strategy.animations: Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fade-ins (staggered). React-fast-marquee for the News/Notices scrolling ticker.

hero_building.description: Modern educational building exterior. Use for Hero or About Us background.

students_classroom.description: Indian schoolgirls in classroom. Use for Academics or Faculty section.

playground.description: Children on modern playground equipment. Use for Facilities or Student Life section.

events.description: Kids in traditional clothing at an event. Use for Events or Cultural achievements section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a multi-page routing setup using React Router for public pages (Home, About, Academics, Admissions, etc.) and a separate layout for the /admin dashboard.
Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts in index.html.
The Hero section must feature a large image with a gradient overlay (e.g., bg-black/40) to ensure high contrast text readability. Use Playfair Display for the main welcome heading.
Include a scrolling news ticker (using react-fast-marquee) either at the very top or directly under the hero section.
Design a distinct 'Two Branches' showcase comparing Birgaon (Main, est. 2002, classes 1-12) and Dhaneli (est. 2013, classes 1-8). Use a split card or bento layout.
Create an Admission Enquiry form using Shadcn Form and Input elements, including a dropdown for selecting the branch.
The Admin Dashboard should be clean and dense, using a sidebar navigation and table views to manage galleries, news, and admissions.
Ensure contrast ratios meet accessibility standards, especially when placing text over images or vibrant accent colors.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not center-align app container text globally; preserve natural reading flows.
Create depth using layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism effects (backdrop-blur-xl) where appropriate.
Never use generic AI emojis for icons; exclusively use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react.
Ensure every interactive element (buttons, links) has distinct hover and focus states with micro-animations.
Never use completely transparent backgrounds for dropdowns, sticky headers, or modals.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute for testing.
